headline: Income Investors Are Embracing SCHD After Back-to-Back Dividend Raises
summary: SCHD has pulled in nearly $800 million in net inflows in a single week this February, and income investors are rotating toward dividend growers as bond yields soften and volatility climbs. The fund now holds $78.4 billion in net assets, making it one of the largest dividend ETFs in the U.S. The appeal is straightforward. ... Income Investors Are Embracing SCHD After Back-to-Back Dividend Raises

headline: Energy prices will fall when U.S. destroys Iran's ability to attack tankers in Strait of Hormuz: Wright
summary: Gas prices have spiked in the U.S. as oil has jumped to over $90 since the war began in Iran.

headline: Iran continues to hit Gulf countries as Israeli strikes intensify; Tehran says new leader appointed
summary: Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates report more strikes on civilian targets as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran continue.
